import React, { useState } from 'react'; import axios from 'axios'; function PlayerForm() { const [firstName, setFirstName] = useState(''); const [iscoach, setIsCoach] = useState(false); function submitPlayer(event) { event.preventDefault(); alert(`Form submitted with firstName: ${firstName}, iscoach: ${iscoach}`); axios.post('http://localhost:4000/players', { firstName: firstName, iscoach: iscoach, }); } function handleCheckBox(event) { setIsCoach(event.target.checked); } return (

Add a new player

setFirstName(event.target.value)} />
{firstName} {iscoach.toString()}
); } export default PlayerForm;
